mapper.select:
select * from product
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by id asc

select * from product
and name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and category_id = #{categoryId}
and tag = #{tag}
and status = 1
order by price asc, id desc
order by price desc, id desc
order by sales desc, id desc
order by create_time desc, id desc
select * from product where category_id = #{categoryId} and status = 1 order by sales desc
select * from product where tag = #{tag} and status = 1 order by sales desc
select * from product where id = #{id} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into product(name, description, price, stock, sales, category_id, status, tag, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values(#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{sales}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{tag}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: select * from product where status = 1 order by sales desc limit 10
